03 · Campaign strategy

Dinner for Parents

Live campaign page

A targeted subscription campaign for working migrants supporting elderly parents in Poland with fresh, home-cooked meals.

ChallengeTurn a practical family need into a clear subscription offer for a highly specific audience.
My roleAudience research, segmentation, positioning, campaign messaging, landing-page structure, leaflets and community outreach.
ValidationAn early migrant-focused community discussion generated 90+ responses and direct audience insight.
